pillars.title: Our Services
pillars.subtitle: Three ways we move your systems forward

items.title: Innovative Products
items.description: We support our clients in innovating pumping products to achieve the target hydraulic performance and efficiency, while minimising their carbon footprint and material intensity.
details: Energy, carbon and material intensity evaluation

items.title: Operations & System Debottlenecking
items.description: We troubleshoot machinery and their systems to eliminate recurring failures and loss of performance. We identify opportunities to reduce energy intensity and carbon emissions, hence bringing down operating cost.
details: Root Cause Analysis - Mechanical seal & bearing failure

items.title: Capital Projects
items.description: We support capital projects and plant upgrades in selecting and implementing optimal pumping solutions, aligned to business and Net Zero Strategies.
details: Energy, carbon and material intensity evaluation

about.title: About Fluensys
about.description: We are an independent engineering consultancy firm based in Central London, UK. With more than 50 years of Pump & Fluids expertise, we deliver practical, tailor-made solutions to small- and medium-sized businesses.

certificationBadges.alt: Member of the British Pump Manufacturers Association
